title: Aito Arctic
description: a small *cough* *cough* mod modpack surrounded by food animals and yourself
body:
Aito Arctic was made for a streamers moderator only server (dont ask who i wont see it).

We were talking about making a server but viewers are unpredictable so decided what if moderator only so everyone is 99% surely good enough people, and then modded they said.

tldr: i have no clue what im talking about.

added alot of building blocks with cool food.

changing the players experience with just playing the game with the origins mod making your player have cool and custom abilities and theres a lot of choices.

either to make the game easier or harder but still making game play more interesting and letting creativity flourish.

some mods included are: delight's, origins, cobblemon, essential.

Enjoyment for free (minecraft account not included)
